zh.lifeSummary: Eva Menges於1640年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她於1660年與Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年1月15日在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eva Menges于1640年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她于1660年与Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年1月15日在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from an altered form of the personal name   Magnus  .
German: from the personal name Me(i)ngoss, from ancient Germanic magin ‘strength, might’ + gōt ‘Goth’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Hungarian Mengesz, a surname of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Manges
meanings: Probably Scottish: variant of Menzies , of which the traditional pronunciation is Mingies.

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Eva Menges was born in 1640, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire. She married Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. in 1660, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 January 1712, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Eva Menges est née en 1640, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Elle a épousé Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. en 1660, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 janvier 1712, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 72 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Eva Menges è nata il nel 1640 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Lei sposato Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. nel 1660, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 gennaio 1712, nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Mengesは1640年にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンで生まれた。1660年にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでJohann Peter Kumpf Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年1月15日にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva Menges(은)는 1640년 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1660년 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Johann Peter Kumpf Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 1월 15일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eva Menges nasceu em 1640, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão. Ela casou-se com Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. em 1660, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1712, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Eva Menges родилась в 1640 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Peter Kumpf Sr. в 1660 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 января 1712 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 72 лет.
